case_title: M. ARTHUR GENSLER JR. & ASSOCIATES, INC. VS. LUCY ESTERAS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,250.00 FILED BY M. ARTHUR GENSLER JR. & ASSOCIATES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ESTERAS, LUCY ESTERAS, CHRISTINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
